t.t-if: o.partner_id.street or o.partner_id.street2 or o.partner_id.city or o.partner_id.state_id or o.partner_id.zip or o.partner_id.country_id

span.t-if: o.move_type == 'out_invoice' and o.state == 'posted' and not res_config.show_reg_no
o.move_type == 'out_invoice' and o.state == 'posted' and res_config.show_reg_no and not res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'

t.t-if: o.generate_qrcode() and res_config.paynow_qr_code and o.move_type == 'out_invoice' and not res_config.use_static_qr
o.generate_qrcode() and res_config.paynow_qr_code and o.move_type == 'out_invoice' and not res_config.use_static_qr

div.p: Please use the following communication for your payment :

o.generate_qrcode() and res_config.paynow_qr_code and o.move_type == 'out_invoice' and not res_config.use_static_qr

p.strong:
Kindly update us your new contact details if any.
You may email it to

t.t-if: o.partner_id.street or o.partner_id.street2 or o.partner_id.city or o.partner_id.state_id or o.partner_id.zip or o.partner_id.country_id

t.t-value: o.invoice_user_id.sudo().lang if o.move_type in ('in_invoice', 'in_refund') else o.partner_id.lang
